{{Infobox character
| name = Kahn Mala
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Archlady, Red Faith's Archlady, former cult leader of the Silent King, Matriarch, Daughter of Dread, Lord
| abilities = Blood Shadow, sacred artist
| affiliations = Red Faith, Redmoon Hall, Silent King, Stormcallers
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

''See also: [[Kahn Mala Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Kahn Mala is an [[Archlady]] associated with [[Redmoon Hall]]. She possesses a [[Blood Shadow]] that manifests as a scarlet cobra wrapped around her neck, which displays its own awareness of others. Physically, she is characterized by gray-streaked hair and skin that appears tightly drawn over her skeletal frame. She demonstrates proficiency in spatial manipulation, utilizing void keys to summon objects and performing spatial transport. In her leadership role, she manages various [[Lords]] and [[Ladies]] and deals with the complexities of sect resources and political alliances. While she is willing to form desperate partnerships for survival, she expresses deep distrust toward certain figures and remains wary of the potential for internal division. She has experienced significant personal loss, including the death of her brother in prison, and is noted for maintaining a calm demeanor even when faced with high-altitude falls or unsettling circumstances.}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Kahn Mala]] is an [[Archlady]] whose spirit feels like blood and poison.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Kahn Mala]] has a [[Shadow]] in the shape of a cobra.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Kahn Mala]] is [[Red Faith]]'s [[Archlady]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Kahn Mala]] pours a shining green elixir over the [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kahn Mala]] is of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kahn Mala]] thanks [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Kahn Mala is an [[Archlady]] and a Matriarch who possesses a [[Blood Shadow]] that manifests as a cobra around her neck. A [[sacred artist]] and the former cult leader of the [[Silent King]], she is known to the [[Stormcallers]] as the [[Daughter of Dread]]. Despite her high standing, she serves as a [[Lord]] who bows to [[Larian]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] is an [[Archlady]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]]'s [[Blood Shadow]] takes the form of a cobra around her neck.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] is the former cult leader of the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] is a Matriarch.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] is called [[Daughter of Dread]] by the [[Stormcallers]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] is an [[Archlady]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] has a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] is a [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] is a [[Lord]] who bows to [[Larian]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Daughter of Dread,” Kahn Mala said. “It wasn’t my favorite choice, but the Stormcallers like it.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
